name: fullstack-pilot
description: Codebase governance for full-stack Microsoft shops (Angular, .NET, SQL Server, Azure)

plugins.name: pilot-core
plugins.description: Shared governance for full-stack Microsoft shops: stack detection, /fsp-bootstrap baseline-module scaffolding (auth/authz/logging/error-handling/health-checks/CORS), and the fsp- pipelines (init, audit, fix, learn, architect, build) every other pilot plugin builds on. Adds MCP discovery, supply-chain/license policy, CI secret scanning, REST API standards, SLO load testing, and incident-response governance, plus the autonomous delivery team (fsp-analyst/scout/architect/qa) and the cross-stack @fullstack-reviewer/@fullstack-implementor/@fullstack-support trio.

plugins.name: pilot-angular
plugins.description: Angular / TypeScript governance for v15-20: signals and state, performance, WCAG 2.2 AA accessibility, UI/UX visual consistency, motion/reduced-motion, permissions-only route guards, OIDC/PKCE authentication, HTTP resilience, routing, SSR, coding standards, theming, shared UI libraries and JSON-schema dynamic forms, testing, i18n, global error handling, PWA/offline, telemetry, Nx/module-federation monorepo and lint governance, OpenAPI/NSwag clients, third-party scripts, feature flags, and NgRx — with @angular-reviewer, @angular-implementor, and @angular-support agents

plugins.name: pilot-dotnet
plugins.description: C# / ASP.NET Core governance: Clean Architecture, SOLID/DRY, performance, caching, permissions-only auth, authentication, security headers, multitenancy, soft delete, audit fields/trail, repository pattern, EF Core patterns, API versioning/pagination/idempotency, Polly resilience, observability, ProblemDetails error handling, validation, messaging (outbox/saga/Service Bus), background jobs, feature flags, SignalR, gRPC, BFF, CQRS/MediatR, testing, data protection, and NuGet governance — with @dotnet-reviewer, @dotnet-implementor, and @dotnet-support agents

plugins.name: pilot-sql
plugins.description: SQL Server / EF Core governance: schema design conventions, injection defense, migration safety, multitenancy isolation, performance review, PII data protection (Always Encrypted, Dynamic Data Masking, TDE), ongoing index/statistics maintenance, and backup/restore-drill verification — with @sql-reviewer, @sql-implementor, and @sql-support agents

plugins.name: pilot-azure
plugins.description: Azure / Bicep governance: CAF naming, security baseline (including a public-network-access hook rule), Well-Architected Framework review, Bicep patterns, centralized observability, CI/CD deployment security, multi-region disaster recovery, cost/FinOps guardrails, AKS cluster governance, API Management gateway policy review, enterprise-scale landing-zone topology, SLO/error-budget policy, and container image security — with @infra-reviewer, @infra-implementor, and @infra-support agents

plugins.name: pilot-rag
plugins.description: Local, self-hosted RAG scaffold for full-stack Microsoft codebases. /fsp-rag-init builds a provider-agnostic Q&A system in ./pilot-rag/ that answers questions about your own Angular/.NET/SQL/Azure code, cited to real files: Microsoft.Extensions.AI (IChatClient/IEmbeddingGenerator, zero vendor refs in the core), Roslyn/Markdown/OpenAPI chunkers with idempotent Qdrant ingestion and secret redaction, an SSE /ask endpoint with a score floor and citations, and a retrieval-hit-rate eval gate. Ollama<->Azure OpenAI by appsettings — with the @rag-implementor and read-only @rag-reviewer agents
